channel.title: Sub-Issues on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Sub-Issues on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Hierarchy view improvements and file uploads in issue forms
item.description:
GitHub Projects hierarchy view gained new improvements, including the ability to filter sub-issues using syntax. GitHub issue forms also added support for file uploads.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: A REST API for GitHub Projects, sub-issues improvements, and more
item.description:
GitHub announced a REST API for GitHub Projects so developers can read and manage project data programmatically, plus enhancements to sub-issues to make breaking down work easier and other related improvements.

  • Source: GitHub
